headline: How The Air Products (APD) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Hydrogen Developments
summary: Analyst fair value estimates for Air Products and Chemicals have shifted, with the price target moving from US$306.62 to US$315.43. This adjustment aligns with recent research that clusters around higher targets and upgrades, highlighting pricing power in key chemical chains, easing helium pressures, and several near term catalysts tied to current supply conditions. As you read on, you will see how these evolving views fit together and what to watch to stay aligned with the changing analyst...
